title: The Long Night: The First Long Night #got #shorts
description: The Long Night was not just winter—it was the near end of the world. Darkness covered the land, and survival became the only goal. #ASOIAF #LongNight #Shorts

scenes.narration: The Long Night was not a season—it was a darkness that seemed like it would never end.
scenes.image_prompt: world covered in darkness with faint icy glow spreading, apocalyptic fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Winter came without warning, stretching beyond days, beyond months… into years.
scenes.image_prompt: endless snowstorm covering villages and forests, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The sun disappeared, and the world was left in cold, fading light.
scenes.image_prompt: dim sky with no sun, pale frozen landscape, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Others moved through the darkness, bringing death with every step.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walkers advancing silently through blizzard, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Entire regions fell, their people lost to cold, hunger, and something far worse.
scenes.image_prompt: abandoned frozen village with signs of destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The dead did not stay dead—rising again to join the growing army of ice.
scenes.image_prompt: fallen bodies reanimating under icy glow, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Hope faded as survivors struggled to endure a world that no longer felt alive.
scenes.image_prompt: small group of survivors around faint fire in frozen wasteland, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The balance of the world was broken—and it seemed nothing could restore it.
scenes.image_prompt: fire being overwhelmed by advancing ice forces, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Long Night became more than a disaster—it became the end of everything people knew.
scenes.image_prompt: world map fading into darkness and ice, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because when the night lasts forever, the question is not who wins—but who survives.
scenes.image_prompt: single flame flickering in endless darkness, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
